player_notes.jalen williams: Out for Game 4 vs. Spurs with a left hamstring injury. Significant minutes/usage shift — monitor OKC bench and SGA usage bumps.
player_notes.de'aaron fox: Cleared to play in Game 4 vs. Thunder despite ankle injury. No known restriction mentioned.
player_notes.dylan harper: Cleared to play in Game 4 vs. Thunder despite adductor injury. No known restriction mentioned.

game_notes.OKC vs SAN: Jalen Williams (hamstring) is out, boosting OKC bench usage — bench scored 76 pts in Game 3. Fox and Harper both cleared to play for San Antonio.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The season context document contains no R2 or Conference Finals series diary for OKC vs SAS. The last documented OKC series was R1 vs PHX (swept 4-0). The last documented SAS series was R1 vs POR (won 4-1).
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Multiple news items confirm OKC and SAS are now in the Western Conference Finals, with OKC leading 2-1 after winning Game 3 on the road 123-108. SGA had 26 points and 12 assists. Wembanyama had 26 points but acknowledged needing to be a better 'team player.' The series is active and ongoing.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add a WCF series diary for OKC vs SAS. Update playoff bracket to reflect Conference Finals stage. OKC leads 2-1. Key facts: SGA continues scoring (T20 lock intact), Wembanyama is healthy and playing (26 pts in G3), bench contributed 76 points in G3 comeback from 15-0 deficit.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: The season context document contains no R2 or Conference Finals series diary for NYK vs CLE. The last documented NYK series was R1 vs ATL (won 4-2). The last documented CLE series was R1 vs TOR (won 4-3).
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Multiple news items confirm NYK and CLE are now in the Eastern Conference Finals, with NYK leading 2-0 after winning Game 2 109-93. Josh Hart scored a playoff career-high 26 points. Jalen Brunson had 19 points and 14 assists. CLE is down 0-2.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add an ECF series diary for NYK vs CLE. Update playoff bracket to reflect Conference Finals stage. NYK leads 2-0. Key facts: Brunson active and producing (19 pts, 14 AST in G2), Hart as a key secondary contributor, CLE facing 0-2 deficit.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: R2 key note states: 'Jalen Williams' hamstring recovery timeline is the primary OKC health variable heading into the next round — his return would restore their ceiling to its highest level.' R1 playoff injury landscape notes him as OUT with left hamstring in the PHX series.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms 'Thunder star wing Jalen Williams was ruled out for Friday night's Game 3 of the Western Conference finals with an injured left hamstring.' Williams remains OUT in the WCF (Game 3), meaning he has not returned through at least WCF G3.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update playoff injury landscape: Jalen Williams (OKC) remains OUT with left hamstring strain through WCF Game 3. Has not returned since R1. Remove any implication that his return was imminent; he is still sidelined in the Conference Finals.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: No injury note for Fox in the playoff injury landscape beyond the R1 SAS vs POR series diary, where he was healthy.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: R1 series diary documents Mitchell's persistent shooting slump across G3-G7 of the TOR series (five consecutive sub-30 games). R2 key note: 'Mitchell's persistent shooting slump across G3-G7 is CLE's most critical tactical variable — whether this represents a structural TOR defensive adjustment that carried into the G7 win or a correctable efficiency pattern determines his R2 ceiling.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News headline 'Down 0-2? Donovan Mitchell and the Cavaliers have been here before' confirms Mitchell and CLE are now in the ECF down 0-2 to NYK, indicating the series is active and Mitchell's R2 performance context is now established (CLE lost Games 1 and 2).
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Add ECF series context for CLE: Mitchell and the Cavaliers are down 0-2 to NYK. Update the R2 section to reflect that the shooting slump concern from the TOR series appears to be continuing or at minimum has not been resolved through at least ECF G2, based on the 109-93 G2 loss.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: R1 series diary (G6) notes: 'Brunson's left ankle status is THE critical NYK variable — his third-quarter exit in the series-clinching game introduces genuine availability and minutes-restriction uncertainty.' R2 key note flags the ankle as the primary NYK health variable.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news shows Brunson had 19 points and 14 assists in NYK's ECF Game 2 win (109-93), suggesting he is active and productive in the ECF. The 14 assists in particular indicate his playmaking is not restricted.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Brunson's injury status: His ECF G2 performance (19 pts, 14 AST) indicates the left ankle concern from the R1 G6 exit has not materially limited him through at least ECF G2. Downgrade from critical concern to monitor; treat as day-to-day but no longer flag as a primary availability risk unless new injury information emerges.
